creator: cse.cem@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 148269
(patch against r273035, apply with -p1)

Sponsored by:   EMC / Isilon storage division

That patch was slightly wrong, arg order should stil be "abfd, name" (bfd_error_handler preprocesses all %B/%A references before blatting out to vprintf). New patch attached. (It appears we don't actually have any binutils translations, which is great for fixing strings):

And testing:

### BEFORE
$ cc a.c -ldwarf
...
/usr/bin/ld: //usr/lib/libelf.so.2: invalid DSO for symbol `elf32_fsize@@R1.0' definition
//usr/lib/libelf.so.2: could not read symbols: Bad value
cc: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)

### AFTER
$ cc a.c -ldwarf
...
/usr/bin/ld: undefined reference to symbol `elf32_fsize@@R1.0' (try linking //usr/lib/libelf.so.2)
//usr/lib/libelf.so.2: could not read symbols: Bad value
cc: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)

That seems like a big improvement.
